rules.rule_text:
rule CryptBot
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "CryptBot system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "UserName (ComputerName):" ascii
		$x2 = "Local Date and Time:" ascii
		$x3 = "OS:" ascii
		$x4 = "Display Resolution:" ascii
		$x5 = "RAM:" ascii
		$x6 = "GPU:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
